# Advisor Jay (Jay Chang at Farther)

> Jay Chang is a fiduciary wealth advisor at Farther based in Tempe, Arizona.
> He works with families, professionals, and business owners on the financial
> decisions that have real consequences: pension elections, equity compensation,
> retirement income planning, business sales, and life transitions. Jay is part
> of Farther, the Inc. 5000 #1 fastest-growing financial services firm in
> America, with $15B+ in assets across the platform.

## About

- [Jay Chang biography](https://www.advisorjay.com/jay-chang): Personal background, philosophy, credentials, and how he works with clients
- [Investment philosophy](https://www.advisorjay.com/investment-philosophy): How Jay approaches portfolio construction and tax-aware investing
- [Process](https://www.advisorjay.com/process): What working with Jay looks like, end to end
- [Areas served](https://www.advisorjay.com/areas-we-serve): Geographic coverage, including Arizona, California, Nevada, and nationwide

## Who Jay works with

- [Telecommunications & Utilities (AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile, SRP, PG&E)](https://www.advisorjay.com/telecommunications-utilities-wealth-management)
- [Aerospace & Defense (Honeywell, Raytheon/RTX)](https://www.advisorjay.com/aerospace-defense-wealth-management)
- [Semiconductor & Tech Professionals (TSMC, Intel, NVIDIA, Microchip, Apple, Amkor)](https://www.advisorjay.com/semiconductor-wealth-management-arizona)
- [Physicians & Executives (Banner Health, Mayo Clinic, Freeport-McMoRan)](https://www.advisorjay.com/physician-executive-wealth-management-phoenix-scottsdale)
- [Families & Life Transitions (divorce, loss of a spouse, inheritance, retirement)](https://www.advisorjay.com/families-life-transitions-wealth-management)
- [Institutional & Non-Profit (endowments, foundations, operating reserves)](https://www.advisorjay.com/institutional-non-profit-wealth-management)

## Services

- [Investment management](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/investment-management)
- [Financial planning](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/financial-planning)
- [Tax planning and optimization](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/tax-optimization)
- [Estate planning](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/estate-planning)
- [Retirement planning](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/retirement-planning)
- [Business owner planning](https://www.advisorjay.com/services/business-owners)

## Tools and calculators

- [All tools](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools): Full list of free, no-signup calculators
- [AT&T Pension Calculator Suite](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/att-pension): Lump sum vs. annuity decision modeling for AT&T employees
- [PG&E Pension Calculator Suite](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/pge-pension): Same for PG&E employees, including post-bankruptcy benefit changes
- [401(k) Withholding Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/401k-withholding-calculator): Tax withholding optimization tool
- [401(k) Projection Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/401k-projection): Long-term 401(k) growth projections
- [Roth Conversion Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/roth-conversion-calculator): Year-by-year Roth conversion modeling
- [RSU & Equity Compensation Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/rsu-equity-compensation-calculator): RSU vesting, ESPP, and equity tax planning
- [Cash Flow Planner](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/cash-flow-planner): Income, expense, and savings flow modeling
- [Monte Carlo Retirement Simulator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/monte-carlo-simulator): Retirement plan stress testing
- [Retirement Savings Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/retirement-savings-calculator): Retirement readiness assessment
- [Inherited IRA Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/inherited-ira-calculator): 10-year RMD distribution modeling for inherited IRAs
- [RMD Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/rmd-calculator): Required Minimum Distribution calculator
- [Social Security Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/social-security-calculator): Benefit timing and claiming strategy
- [CA to NV Tax Savings Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/ca-nv-tax-savings): California to Nevada relocation tax modeling
- [Estate Complexity Assessment](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/estate-complexity): Estate planning complexity scoring
- [Income Annuity Estimator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/income-annuity): Guaranteed income annuity quote modeling
- [Business Exit Planning Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/business-exit-planning-calculator): Business sale readiness scoring
- [Time Value of Money Calculator](https://www.advisorjay.com/tools/tvm-calculator): TVM, FV, and PV calculations

## Get in touch

- [Contact](https://www.advisorjay.com/contact): Send Jay a message or request a call
- [Schedule a virtual meeting](https://www.advisorjay.com/schedule-consultation): Book directly on Jay's calendar
- [Wealth review request](https://www.advisorjay.com/wealth-review): Confidential financial review request form
